prompt: I want to add a new palette for 'GitHub'. I have the hex colors: #24292e (bg), #ffffff (fg), #0366d6 (blue), #28a745 (green). Can you create the canonical JSON in `palettes/`, generate the .clr file, and fill in any missing color names using the reference list?

assertions.text: palettes.json contains the new GitHub entry
Color names are populated for all 4 hex values
